title: Jujutsu Kaisen
description: This Modpack adds all Jujutsu Kaisen characters and their abilities
body:
## ⚡ Jejutsu Kaisen – The Modpack ## 
**Step into the world of Jujutsu Kaisen and master the power of cursed energy. JJK: Cursed Awakening transforms Minecraft into a dark, supernatural battleground where sorcerers and curses fight for dominance.**
**Harness unique cursed techniques, unlock powerful domain expansions, and choose your path to become a skilled jujutsu sorcerer or embrace the chaos as a special-grade curse. Train, level up, and refine your abilities while facing increasingly dangerous cursed spirits across a revamped world.**

## 🔥 Features 
- Cursed Energy System with progression
  
- Unique Techniques & Abilities inspired by JJK
  
- Domain Expansions & Special Attacks
  
- Powerful Boss Curses & Events
  
- RPG-style leveling & skill upgrades
  
- Optimized performance for multiplayer servers
  
- Balanced PvP & PvE combat
##
Explore, train, and fight in a world where only the strongest survive.
Will you exorcise the curses… or become one?
